name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and flex lines of credit using your vehicle as collateral, accepting most credit types at hundreds of US locations.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, with this Memphis location on Summer Avenue operating since February 2007. The company specializes in secured title loans and lines of credit, using a borrower's vehicle title as collateral rather than relying solely on credit score. TitleMax operates physical storefronts across multiple states, with this Tennessee location serving the greater Memphis area with bilingual staff.

At this Memphis location, TitleMax offers two primary product types. The first is a Title Pledge and Flex Line of Credit — a secured loan or revolving credit line backed by the borrower's clear vehicle title. Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the title is held. Requirements include a clear title, the vehicle itself, and a valid government-issued ID. The second product is an unsecured flexible line of credit (personal loan), available both in-store and online, requiring a bank statement, proof of income if needed, and residency in one of 11 eligible states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, or WI.

What distinguishes TitleMax from traditional lenders is its accessibility to borrowers with poor or limited credit histories. Because the loan is secured against a vehicle's value, credit score is a secondary factor. The company emphasizes same-day cash, quick approvals, and flexible repayment. This Summer Avenue location has earned 481+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average, with staff members like Nicole and Joyce frequently cited by name for professionalism and helpfulness. Bilingual service is also available.

Honest assessment: TitleMax fills a genuine gap for credit-invisible consumers who need emergency cash and own a vehicle outright. However, title loans as a product category carry among the highest APRs in consumer finance — often 100–300% annualized or more — though TitleMax does not publish specific rates on this page. Defaulting on a title loan means losing your vehicle, which can create a compounding financial crisis. Borrowers should exhaust lower-cost options — credit union PALs, employer advances, CDFI loans — before using a title loan. This is a last-resort product best used for genuine short-term emergencies with a clear repayment plan.
address: 1328 E Belt Line Rd, Richardson, TX 75081

company_info.headquarters: 1328 E Belt Line Rd, Richardson, TX 75081

pros: Same-day cash disbursement upon approval — no multi-day wait
Vehicle title replaces credit score as primary qualification factor — most credit types accepted
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while the loan is outstanding
Offers both secured title loans AND unsecured personal lines of credit at the same location
Bilingual staff at this Memphis location
481+ Google reviews averaging 5.0/5 — consistently praised staff by name
Online unsecured line of credit available in 11 states with flexible withdrawal (all at once or over time)
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on the website — title loans typically carry triple-digit annualized rates
Defaulting means losing your vehicle, a severe consequence for borrowers already in financial distress
Online unsecured loans restricted to 11 states only (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Closed Sundays, limiting emergency access on weekends
Requires a clear vehicle title — borrowers still making car payments do not qualify for the secured product
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit who own their vehicle free and clear
Consumers needing same-day cash for a genuine short-term emergency with a definite repayment plan
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person service with bilingual support
Borrowers in eligible states who want an unsecured revolving line of credit with flexible drawdown
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for credit-challenged borrowers who own a paid-off vehicle and need emergency cash the same day — the title secures the loan where credit history cannot. The critical caveat is cost: title loans carry extremely high APRs not disclosed on their site, and default risks vehicle repossession, making this a last-resort option only.
services: Auto title pledge (secured loan against vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (secured, revolving — draw as needed up to credit limit)
Unsecured personal line of credit (online, 11 states)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
